name: sokuji
description: Live speech translation powered by on-device AI and cloud providers — OpenAI, Google Gemini, Palabra.ai, Kizuna AI, Volcengine, and more
summaryZh: Live speech translation powered by on-device AI and cloud providers — OpenAI, Google Gemini, Palabra.ai, Kizuna AI, Volcengine, and more 这是偏语音和音频方向的项目，适合做语音助手和实时交互场景。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合在持续跟踪 AI 开源趋势时作为重点观察对象。
